_comment: Alt text for migrated post images. Keyed by image basename (filename only). Read by scripts/ghost-to-mdx.mjs during conversion so alt text survives Ghost-export re-runs. Empty string = intentionally decorative (e.g. hero photos paired with an H1). When unsure, prefer the editorial caption over guessing. Add new entries here when adding new posts; the script falls back to '' if a key isn't found.
bike.jpg: A bicycle leaning at the roadside, marking the way to de Ceuvel.
Indy.jpg: Indy Johar speaking to a seated audience inside the makeshift wooden structure at the Metabolic Lab.
Civic-Economy-Protocols.jpg: Martijn de Waal opening a session at the Metabolic Lab during the Civic Economy Protocols workshop, 2025.
governing-for-the-planet-1.jpg: Cover image for Jonathan S Blake's essay on governing for the planet, published in Aeon.
DeCeuvel-1.jpg: A houseboat at de Ceuvel, Amsterdam, converted into an artist studio.
201679b5-12d5-4051-b326-882908b55790_850: Walter Benjamin, mid-20th century photograph, sourced from Esther Leslie's essay marking the 75th anniversary of Benjamin's death.
3ddd5da4-d305-4794-831c-14705f92aa5c_600: An archival press photograph from the era of Benjamin's writing, captioned by Times Wide World Photos.
13a7d5fa-cf1b-4a2e-829b-2fd5b6210036_204: Story Factory Art Write Light Event 2022, an experiential storytelling installation by Studio ESEM.
Story Factory Art Write Light Event 2022, an experiential storytelling installation by Studio ESEM.
970e8eda-3f23-4599-a103-33f177de129f_564: Albert Einstein riding a bicycle outside Ben Meyer's house in Santa Barbara, California, 1933. Source: Leo Baeck Institute.
17989e31-a8be-4358-852a-9472dda07a9b_266: A printed book about Albert Einstein, photographed on a desk.
8e1ac1fc-a4f7-42ce-a5ec-7ae7b4cb6a68_100: Albert Einstein standing at a blackboard covered in mathematical calculations, 1921. Hulton Archive.
6343dd6e-3b17-4878-ae66-b7bf6f2fddd7_640: Photograph credited to Robert and Talbot Trudeau, sourced via Flickr.
eda7e010-7b46-4844-97d5-7b2a5b127102_102: Illustration of digital landscapes and changing patterns of attention.
We-Care_Diagram-2.jpg: Concept diagram for the We Care project, a participatory storytelling collaboration with RMIT.
Screenshot-2025-01-31-at-4.27.54---pm.pn: Documentation from a We Care workshop session, where participants explored Care and Common Growth as design principles for an innovation precinct.
We-care-5.png: Portraits from the We Care participatory storytelling project, RMIT City North.
Screenshot-2025-10-22-at-4.43.13---PM.pn: We Care portraits featured on STORYBOX during the City North Activation program, October and November 2025.
Screen-Shot-2025-08-12-at-2.58.27-pm-2-1: Visualisation suggesting the citizen as an active interface for civic AI.
Computer.jpg: Magnetic core memory of an early IBM computer, photographed at the Women as Technology exhibition, Design Museum Den Bosch, 2025.
We Care: Defining a politics for learning habitats. RMIT City North Social Innovation Precinct, 2025. Creative direction by Studio ESEM.
